hero.title: Train for the
hero.subtitle: Professional electrical training programs designed for real-world application. From circuit fundamentals to advanced installations — we build electricians.

about.title: Built on Precision,
about.description: CMC Electric LLC is a professional electrical training and services company based in the USA. We combine hands-on experience with structured curriculum to prepare electricians for success.
about.mission: Our mission is to deliver high-quality electrical education that meets industry standards and prepares students for a rewarding career in the trades.
about.value1_desc: Every module built on industry standards and real-world application.
about.value2_desc: Organized pathways from fundamentals to advanced certifications.
about.value3_desc: Instructors with years of field experience guiding every student.
about.value4_desc: Preparation for the Journeyman exam and real industry placement.

programs.title: Industry-Ready
programs.subtitle: Comprehensive programs covering everything from basic circuits to professional installations.

services.subtitle: Expert electrical services for residential and commercial clients across the USA.
